title: Mystic Realms
description: a modpack to expand on the magical world
body:
This is a modpack to expand on the world of magic that is all around you. Explore the world where you will encounter new biomes, unexplainable landscapes, and unique magical creatures. 
You will find yourself emersed from the beginning as you pick your origin all the way to which spells you wish to master. Fight dragons ride griffins tame wyverns swim with sea serpents and explore mysterious dungeons any of it and more is here.
